channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [OLPCL] Olympic Cards Ltd Defaults on Loan Repayment to HDFC Bank
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Olympic Cards Ltd has disclosed a default on a term loan from HDFC Bank. The default amount, including principal and interest, is Rs. 15.17 Cr as of 20-02-2026. The company's total outstanding borrowings from banks amount to Rs. 9.16 Cr, including short-term debt. The total financial indebtedness of the listed entity stands at Rs. 9.16 Cr as of 31-12-2025. The company's contact details are provided for record.

  • Olympic Cards Ltd has defaulted on a term loan from HDFC Bank
  • The default amount is Rs. 15.17 Cr, including principal and interest
  • The company's total outstanding borrowings from banks amount to Rs. 9.16 Cr
  • The total financial indebtedness of the listed entity stands at Rs. 9.16 Cr as of 31-12-2025
  • The company has provided its contact details for record

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OLYMPIC CARDS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [PATANJALI] Patanjali Foods Ltd to Acquire Leasehold Rights and Plant & Machinery from Patanjali Ayurved Ltd for INR 749.90 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Patanjali Foods Ltd has entered into an agreement with Patanjali Ayurved Ltd, a Promoter Group Company, to acquire leasehold rights for a portion of a land parcel allotted to PAL by the Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority (YEIDA) and the biscuit manufacturing plant and machinery installed at the plot. The total consideration for the transaction is INR 749.90 Crore (Indian Rupees Seven Hundred Forty Nine Crore and Ninety Lakh Only). The transaction is expected to enhance operational efficiencies, improve production capabilities, and better cater to the company's growing business requirements.

  • Patanjali Foods Ltd to acquire leasehold rights and plant & machinery from Patanjali Ayurved Ltd
  • Transaction value is INR 749.90 Crore
  • Transaction aimed at enhancing operational efficiencies and production capabilities
  • Acquisition aligned with the company's long-term strategy of strengthening its manufacturing base and supporting future growth

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Patanjali Foods Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DEVLAB] Dev Labtech Venture Ltd Subscribes Shares in Wholly Owned Subsidiary DEV LABTECH TRADING FZCO
item.description:
Dev Labtech Venture Ltd has made a payment of AED 4,90,000 towards the initial subscription of 490 equity shares of AED 1,000 each in its Wholly Owned Subsidiary incorporated in Dubai, UAE, namely ‘DEV LABTECH TRADING FZCO’. The confirmation for the receipt of the said payment has been received on 14th March, 2026. The new subsidiary, DEV LABTECH TRADING FZCO, is engaged in the trading of Jewellery, Diamonds, Pearls & Precious Stones.

  • Dev Labtech Venture Ltd has subscribed to the shares of its Wholly Owned Subsidiary, DEV LABTECH TRADING FZCO, based in Dubai, UAE.
  • The total share capital of DEV LABTECH TRADING FZCO is AED 490,000 divided into 490 Shares of AED 1,000 par value.
  • The new subsidiary is engaged in the trading of Jewellery, Diamonds, Pearls & Precious Stones.
  • The purpose of this acquisition is for the expansion of the business and to make a global presence in the UAE markets.
  • The Company has fully subscribed the 100% shares of DEV LABTECH TRADING FZCO at a cost of AED 4,90,000.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Labtech Venture Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SPITZE] Maruti Interior Products Announces Rights Issue with Trading Implications for Odd Lots
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Maruti Interior Products Limited has announced a Rights Issue of 4,53,00,000 equity shares at a price of X10/- each, including a premium of Nil. The issue size is up to X45,30,00,000 with a rights entitlement ratio of 3:1. The record date is March 12, 2026. The company's equity shares are listed on the SME Platform of BSE Limited with a current market lot of 1,000 shares. Rights Entitlements (REs) will be tradable on the stock exchange platform during the RE trading period, but any shareholding not in multiples of 1,000 shares will constitute an odd lot, which may not be tradable on the stock exchange trading platform until the lot size is revised by the exchange or the holding is consolidated into marketable lots.

  • Maruti Interior Products Limited has announced a Rights Issue of 4,53,00,000 equity shares
  • The issue size is up to X45,30,00,000 with a rights entitlement ratio of 3:1
  • The record date is March 12, 2026
  • The company's equity shares are listed on the SME Platform of BSE Limited with a current market lot of 1,000 shares
  • Rights Entitlements (REs) will be tradable on the stock exchange platform during the RE trading period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Maruti Interior Products Ltd | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [GMRINFRA] GMR Airports Crosses 111 Million Passengers Mark in YTD FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

GMR Airports Ltd reported a resilient traffic of 10.3 million passengers in February 2026, with a 0.3% year-over-year growth. The domestic traffic stood at 7.7 million, while the international traffic was 2.5 million. The company handled a record 111.22 million passengers in YTD FY26, a 1.1% year-over-year growth. The Delhi airport reported the highest-ever single day passenger traffic of approximately 2.6 lakh on 8th February 2026.

  • GMR Airports served 10.3 million passengers in February 2026 with a 0.3% YoY growth
  • Handled a record 111.22 million passengers in YTD FY26, a 1.1% YoY growth
  • Delhi airport reported the highest-ever single day passenger traffic of approximately 2.6 lakh on 8th February 2026
  • Cargo volumes reached a record 1.05 Million Metric Tonnes in YTD FY26
  • Delhi Airport awarded Cargo Airport of the Year — India at the STAT Trade Times International Awards for Excellence in Air Cargo

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GMR Airports Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [DMART] Avenue Supermarts Ltd Announces Authorized KMPs for Material Disclosures
item.description:
Avenue Supermarts Ltd, the company behind the popular retail chain D-Mart, has announced the list of Key Managerial Personnel (KMPs) authorized to determine materiality of an event or information and make disclosures to stock exchanges. This decision is in accordance with the Regulation 30(5) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The authorized KMPs include Mr. Anshul Asawa, Managing Director & CEO; Mr. Ramakant Baheti, Whole-time Director & CFO; and Mrs. Ashu Gupta, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer. The contact details and email ID for investor relations have also been provided.

  • Avenue Supermarts Ltd announces authorized KMPs for material disclosures
  • KMPs authorized in accordance with SEBI regulations
  • Includes Managing Director, Whole-time Director, and Company Secretary
  • Contact details and email ID for investor relations provided
  • Update reflects the company's commitment to transparency and disclosure requirements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avenue Supermarts Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ELPROINTL] Elpro International Ltd. Discloses Inspection Proceedings by Central GST Department
item.description:
Elpro International Ltd. has disclosed information regarding inspection proceedings conducted by the Central - Goods and Services Tax Department ('GST') under Section 67 of Central GST Act, 2017. The proceedings took place on March 13, 2026, and concluded on the same day at 11:50 p.m. The company has provided all necessary information and clarifications as requested and will continue to do so if required. At present, there is no material impact on the company's activities due to these search proceedings.

  • Elpro International Ltd. discloses inspection proceedings by Central GST Department under Section 67 of Central GST Act, 2017.
  • The proceedings took place on March 13, 2026, and concluded on the same day.
  • The company has provided all necessary information and clarifications as requested.
  • No official document is issued in this regard.
  • At present, there is no material impact on the company's activities due to these search proceedings.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ELPRO INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [KRISHIVAL] Promoter and Managing Director of Krishival Foods Ltd Acquires 0.02% Shares in Open Market
item.description:
Aparna Sujit Bangar, Promoter and Managing Director of Krishival Foods Ltd, has acquired 4,000 equity shares, representing 0.02% of the total paid-up share capital of the Company. The acquisition was made on March 13, 2026, through the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE). Bangar also holds 12,40,361 partly paid-up equity shares, which are independent of and unrelated to the above acquisition.

  • Aparna Sujit Bangar, Promoter and Managing Director of Krishival Foods Ltd, acquires 0.02% shares in the Company.
  • The acquisition was made on March 13, 2026, through the National Stock Exchange of India Limited (NSE).
  • Bangar also holds 12,40,361 partly paid-up equity shares, which are independent of and unrelated to the above acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Krishival Foods Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [RCOM] Reliance Communications Subsidiary's Loan Account Classified as 'Fraud' by SBI
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Reliance Communications Ltd. has disclosed a letter received from State Bank of India (SBI) classifying the loan account of its subsidiary, Reliance Telecom Limited (RTL), as 'fraud'. The letter was received on March 13, 2026, and RTL is currently undergoing corporate insolvency resolution process under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The credit facilities/loan account pertain to the period prior to the CIRP of RTL and are required to be resolved as part of a resolution plan or in liquidation. The resolution professional of RTL has filed avoidance applications in terms of the Code, which are sub-judice. Upon approval of the resolution plan, RCOM and RTL shall have immunity against any liability for purported offences committed prior to the CIRP.

  • Reliance Communications Ltd. discloses a letter received from SBI classifying the loan account of its subsidiary, Reliance Telecom Limited (RTL), as 'fraud'.
  • RTL is currently undergoing corporate insolvency resolution process under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
  • The credit facilities/loan account pertain to the period prior to the CIRP of RTL and are required to be resolved as part of a resolution plan or in liquidation.
  • Avoidance applications have been filed by the resolution professional of RTL, which are sub-judice.
  • Upon approval of the resolution plan, RCOM and RTL shall have immunity against any liability for purported offences committed prior to the CIRP.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE COMMUNICATIONS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [DECANBRG] Open Offer Completed by Satani Bearings Ltd, Promoter Reclassified to Public Category
item.description:
Satani Bearings Ltd (Formerly known as Deccan Bearings Limited) has completed the Open Offer made by Pareshbhai Gushabhai Satani, Tanuj Pareshkumar Satani, Chirag Ramjibhai Satani and Ramjibhai Gushabhai Satani to the public shareholders. Pursuant to the completion of the Open Offer, the following existing promoter(s) of the Company shall cease to be classified as Promoter / Promoter Group and shall be reclassified as Public Shareholder(s): NIRUPA N VORA HUF, NIRUPA N VORA, KIRAN NAGINDAS VORA, PRERNA KIRAN VORA, KIRAN VORA HUF, NIP EXPORTS PRIVATE LIMITED, MUKESH N VORA, MANALI M VORA, GOPA M VORA, MUKESH N VORA HUF, MANISH N VORA, MANISH N VORA HUF. The existing promoters, namely Hashmukh R Gandhi, Bhagatsingh Rajpurohit and Balu Narang, shall continue to be classified as promoters of the Company.

  • Open Offer by Satani Bearings Ltd completed successfully.
  • Existing promoters reclassified as Public Shareholders.
  • Hashmukh R Gandhi, Bhagatsingh Rajpurohit and Balu Narang continue as promoters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DECCAN BEARINGS LTD. | Category: Deals
